title: Election 2026 LIVE: Security tightened in EVM strongrooms in Kolkata amid TMC protest over 'irregularities'
description: Election 2026 LIVE: Security was tightened at Kolkata strong room ahead of May 4 counting amid TMC allegations of BJP-EC collusion in opening ballot boxes. Earlier, BJP workers alleged that a TMC vehicle was carrying suspicious items and blocked it, as tensions continued in Kolkata after voting.
